resources.string: No shortcuts found. Make sure this app has launcher permissions.
Permission denied. This app needs launcher-level access to enumerate shortcuts.
Target app has been uninstalled. Please reconfigure.
Shortcut is no longer available. Please reconfigure.
This app needs to be set as the default launcher to access shortcuts. Please grant the Home role when prompted.
Your shortcut has been saved. Please switch back to your regular launcher in Settings \u2192 Default Apps \u2192 Home App so this app acts as a proxy.
